calendar.matters:
Petition For Order Determining Title To Real Property And Personal Property
Off Calendar Oct-01-2018 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: David Goh for Barbara Renfrew (Petitioner).

The Court stated that there is a question as to whether all of the assets were held in the Trust at the time of the general assignment of March 16, 2011 and that there is a problem with the oppenheimer account. Mr. Goh stated that the oppenheimer account was not held and not open at the time of the general assignment. The Court granted the Petition for Order Determining Title to Real Property and Personal Property as to all of the assets other than the oppenheimer account. The petition is granted in part and denied as to the oppenheimer account (subject to the Court revising the order).

Judge: Peter J. Busch. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: R. Rosado. Not reported.
